description_long: This is a rectangular chaise with a distressed, painted wooden base and a thick, upholstered cushion on top. The cushion is a muted teal color with visible wear marks and a slightly textured surface, suggesting frequent use or intentional vintage styling. The base features four short, blocky legs and six prominent metal handles, three on each long side, indicating the presence of integrated drawers for storage. The wood is finished in a weathered white, with areas of exposed grain and scuffing that add to its rustic, urban character. The overall design is functional yet stylish, blending utilitarian storage with comfortable seating. This piece would fit well in urban parks, public waiting areas, or communal spaces where both seating and storage are valued.
description: A weathered wooden chaise with a teal upholstered cushion and six metal-handled drawers, combining seating and storage in a rustic, urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the teal cushion, three metal-handled drawers, and distressed white wood base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the cushion, the short blocky legs, and a single metal handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain distressed wood panel without handles or drawers, and the full width of the cushion.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the cushion's wear and a single metal handle.
attribute_backrest_design: There is no visible backrest on this chaise; the seating surface is flat and open, designed for lounging or sitting from any side.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and blocky, made of the same distressed wood as the base, with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid teal color with visible wear marks and a slightly textured, matte finish, but no distinct pattern or tufting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, large, attached cushion covering the entire top surface of the chaise, with no loose or additional cushions visible.
